meta.description: Verified civic references and fallback datasets. No synthetic election facts.

officialGuidance.title: Voter registration and Form 6
officialGuidance.summary: Official registration should be completed through NVSP/ECI services. Use Form 6 where applicable.

officialGuidance.title: Polling station lookup
officialGuidance.summary: Polling booth details should be verified through the official Electoral Search portal using voter details.
